## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1) {#trm1.3.-adherence-to-atfm-slots-pi1 .Heading-2-TZ}

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was 99.2%, the same as 2024 value -- last year of RP3. This is the second highest among RP4 states. All individual airports presented results close to the national average.

With regard to the 0.8% of flights that did not adhere, 0.3% were early and 0.5% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
